name: Test Scenario - Virement bancaire
description: Effectuer un virement et valider l’opération complète

steps.action: Given I authenticate with valid credentials and receive an access token

api_config.name: http://localhost:8080/obp/v4.0.0/users/{USER_ID}/auth-context
api_config.description:
Create User Auth Context. These key value pairs will be propagated over connector to adapter. Normally used for mapping OBP user and
Bank User/Customer.
User Authentication is Required. The User must be logged in. The Application must also be authenticated.

URL Parameters:

USER_ID: 9ca9a7e4-6d02-40e3-a129-0b2bf89de9b1

JSON request body fields:

key: CustomerNumber

value: 5987953

JSON response body fields:

key: CustomerNumber

time_stamp: 1100-01-01T01:01:01.000Z

user_auth_context_id:

user_id: 9ca9a7e4-6d02-40e3-a129-0b2bf89de9b1

value: 5987953
api_config.responses: "[{\"Code\": \"201\", \"Description\": \"Success\", \"Structure JSON\": {\"required\": [\"time_stamp\", \"user_id\", \"key\", \"user_auth_context_id\", \"value\"], \"properties\": {\"time_stamp\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"format\": \"date\", \"example\": \"1100-01-01T00:00:00Z\"}, \"user_id\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"9ca9a7e4-6d02-40e3-a129-0b2bf89de9b1\"}, \"key\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"CUSTOMER_NUMBER\"}, \"user_auth_context_id\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"613c83ea-80f9-4560-8404-b9cd4ec42a7f\"}, \"value\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"78987432\"}}}}, {\"Code\": \"400\", \"Description\": \"Error\", \"Structure JSON\": {\"properties\": {\"message\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"OBP-20001: User not logged in. Authentication is required!\"}}}}]"
api_config.parametres_body: [{"name": "key", "in": "body", "required": true, "type": "string", "format": null, "description": "", "enum": null, "default": null, "minimum": null, "maximum": null, "example": "CUSTOMER_NUMBER", "nullable": null, "readOnly": null, "writeOnly": null}, {"name": "value", "in": "body", "required": true, "type": "string", "format": null, "description": "", "enum": null, "default": null, "minimum": null, "maximum": null, "example": "78987432", "nullable": null, "readOnly": null, "writeOnly": null}]

steps.action: When I request the list of my accounts

api_config.name: http://localhost:8080/obp/v4.0.0/my/accounts
api_config.description:
Returns the list of accounts containing private views for the user.
Each account lists the views available to the user.

optional request parameters:

  • account_type_filter: one or many accountType value, split by comma
  • account_type_filter_operation: the filter type of account_type_filter, value must be INCLUDE or EXCLUDE

whole url example:
/my/accounts?account_type_filter=330,CURRENT+PLUS&account_type_filter_operation=INCLUDE

User Authentication is Required. The User must be logged in. The Application must also be authenticated.

JSON response body fields:

account_routings:

account_type: AC

accounts:

address:

bank_id: gh.29.uk

description: Description of the object. Maximum length is 2000. It can be any characters here.

id: d8839721-ad8f-45dd-9f78-2080414b93f9

is_public: false

label: My Account

scheme: OBP

short_name:

views:
api_config.responses: "[{\"Code\": \"200\", \"Description\": \"Success\", \"Structure JSON\": {\"required\": [\"accounts\"], \"properties\": {\"accounts\": {\"type\": \"array\", \"items\": {\"required\": [\"account_routings\", \"label\", \"account_type\", \"bank_id\", \"id\", \"views\"], \"properties\": {\"account_routings\": {\"type\": \"array\", \"items\": {\"required\": [\"scheme\", \"address\"], \"properties\": {\"scheme\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"OBP\"}, \"address\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"8ca8a7e4-6d02-40e3-a129-0b2bf89de9f0\"}}}}, \"label\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"String\"}, \"account_type\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"330\"}, \"bank_id\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"gh.29.uk\"}, \"id\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"5995d6a2-01b3-423c-a173-5481df49bdaf\"}, \"views\": {\"type\": \"array\", \"items\": {\"required\": [\"id\", \"short_name\", \"description\", \"is_public\"], \"properties\": {\"id\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"owner\"}, \"short_name\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"owner\"}, \"description\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"This view is for the owner for the account.\"}, \"is_public\": {\"type\": \"boolean\", \"example\": \"false\"}}}}}}}}}}, {\"Code\": \"400\", \"Description\": \"Error\", \"Structure JSON\": {\"properties\": {\"message\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"OBP-20001: User not logged in. Authentication is required!\"}}}}]"

steps.action: Then I should see at least one account available

api_config.name: /obp/v4.0.0/banks/{BANK_ID}/accounts/{ACCOUNT_ID}/account-access/revoke
api_config.description:
Revoke the User identified by USER_ID access to the view identified by VIEW_ID.

User Authentication is Required. The User must be logged in. The Application must also be authenticated. and the user needs to be account holder.

URL Parameters:

ACCOUNT_ID: 8ca8a7e4-6d02-40e3-a129-0b2bf89de9f0

BANK_ID: gh.29.uk

JSON request body fields:

is_system: true

user_id: 9ca9a7e4-6d02-40e3-a129-0b2bf89de9b1

view:

view_id: owner

JSON response body fields:

revoked:
api_config.responses: "[{\"Code\": \"201\", \"Description\": \"Success\", \"Structure JSON\": {\"required\": [\"revoked\"], \"properties\": {\"revoked\": {\"type\": \"boolean\", \"example\": \"true\"}}}}, {\"Code\": \"400\", \"Description\": \"Error\", \"Structure JSON\": {\"properties\": {\"message\": {\"type\": \"string\", \"example\": \"OBP-20001: User not logged in. Authentication is required!\"}}}}]"
api_config.parametres_path: [{"name": "ACCOUNT_ID", "required": true, "type": "string", "format": null, "description": "The account id"}, {"name": "BANK_ID", "required": true, "type": "string", "format": null, "description": "The bank id"}]
api_config.parametres_body: [{"name": "user_id", "in": "body", "required": true, "type": "string", "format": null, "description": "", "enum": null, "default": null, "minimum": null, "maximum": null, "example": "9ca9a7e4-6d02-40e3-a129-0b2bf89de9b1", "nullable": null, "readOnly": null, "writeOnly": null}, {"name": "view", "in": "body", "required": true, "type": "string", "format": null, "description": "", "enum": null, "default": null, "minimum": null, "maximum": null, "example": null, "nullable": null, "readOnly": null, "writeOnly": null, "$ref": "#/definitions/PostViewJsonV400"}]
